api_request_behavior.selected_result: requests GET /parcels/{official_parcel_id}?include_geometry=true when backend API mode is enabled
api_request_behavior.fallback: if highlight_geometry is missing or invalid, centroid/extent zoom and marker behavior remain active

geometry_conversion.arcgis_target: ArcGIS Polygon rings with wkid 4326 by default
geometry_conversion.multi_polygon_strategy: flatten polygon rings into one ArcGIS Polygon graphic for the selected parcel
geometry_conversion.invalid_geometry_behavior: log warning and skip boundary graphic without crashing SceneView

sceneview_behavior.boundary_style: transparent fill with visible gold outline
sceneview_behavior.selection_scope: only the actively selected parcel is highlighted
sceneview_behavior.previous_selection: focus layer removeAll clears prior marker and boundary before rendering the new selection

remaining_map_intelligence_gaps: parcel geometry simplification strategy for very large features
backend geometry generalization endpoint if production payloads grow

validation.backend_geometry_endpoint: GET /parcels/CFS-PARCEL-0149726579?include_geometry=true returned parcel detail with highlight geometry content
validation.visual_smoke_test: not automated; Playwright is not installed and the in-app Browser tool is not exposed in this session
